subcodes.first_line: O ye believing women, O ye steadfast handmaidens, O ye who are attracted to the divine fragrances! The province of Mazandaran is the homeland of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المومنات ایتها القانتات ایتها المنجذبات کشور مازندران موطن حضرت رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love of God
